response: MIT, founded in 1861, is ranked as the #1 university in the world and boasts an extremely selective acceptance rate of just 3.9%. With a student body of 11,500 and a faculty of 1,069, this prestigious institution has produced 98 Nobel laureates and maintains a massive $24.6 billion endowment. The annual tuition at MIT is $57,590, reflecting its status as one of the world's leading educational institutions.
